reference: Most sore throats are caused by infection with beta-hemolytic streptococci bacteria. Your daughter needs to undergo the following tests: ASO titer and throat culture. This will confirm the strain of bacteria. In the meantime, administer the following medications: Co-amoxiclav six hundred and twenty-five mg three times daily, Pantoprazole forty mg once daily in the morning before breakfast, and Voveran SR one hundred mg two tablets twice daily. Gargle three times a day with warm salt water. This treatment is to be followed for seven days. Thank you, and take care.
text: Most sore throats are caused by infection with Beta-hemolytic streptococci bacteria. Your daughter needs to undergo the following tests: ASO titer and throat culture. This will confirm the strain of bacteria. In the meantime, administer the following medications: co-amoxiclav 625 mg 3 times daily, pantoprazole 40 mg once daily in the morning before breakfast, and Volvoran SR 100 mg 2 tablets twice daily. Gargle 3 times a day with warm salt water. This treatment is to be followed for 7 days. Thank you, and take care.
